scripts.dev:with-verification-worker: concurrently -k -n web,worker -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=@workspace/ownerr-web-app" "npm run sync-worker:http"
scripts.marketplace:setup-production: npm run marketplace:ensure-schema && npm run marketplace:seed-demo
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present --workspace=@workspace/scripts --workspace=@workspace/ownerr-web-app --workspace=@workspace/mockup-sandbox --workspace=@workspace/api-server --workspace=@workspace/sync-worker --workspace=@workspace/integrations-sync --workspace=@workspace/integrations-core --workspace=@workspace/verification-automation
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run lint
scripts.test:verification: npm run test --workspace=@workspace/verification-automation && node --env-file=.env.local --test scripts/verification-platform.integration.test.mjs scripts/verification-flows.smoke.mjs && npm run seed:marketplace-qa && node --env-file=.env.local --test scripts/marketplace-desk.smoke.mjs
